server.description: Daemon name; for parity with `client`. Defaults to `"lad"`.

protocol_version.description: The single protocol version negotiated for this connection.

capabilities.description: Server-advertised capabilities. Fields are additive across minors; unknown ones must be ignored by clients (architecture §3 版本策略).

adapters.description: Names of adapters the daemon can spawn (e.g. `["claude", "codex"]`).

cron.description: True once the cron subsystem is enabled (post-M1).

worktree.description: True once worktree-based isolation is enabled (post-M1).
